g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about the Aurum core concept')
sendPrompt('What APIs should Aurum use for market data?')
sendPrompt('How would commodities data work in Aurum?')
sendPrompt('What FX pairs should Aurum show?')
sendPrompt('How would the Fear and Greed index work in Aurum?')
sendPrompt('How would geopolitical risk work in Aurum?')
sendPrompt('How would headline sentiment work in Aurum?')
sendPrompt('How could Aurum add an AI briefing feature?')
sendPrompt('How could Aurum show a scenario overlay?')
sendPrompt('How could Aurum connect to the drone brand concept?')
